description: Fetch raw HTML, rendered HTML, or clean Markdown from public webpages through Just Serp API.

operations.description: Get webpage crawl data, including returns full raw HTML content, fast and cost-efficient, and optimized for static page crawling, for scraping, metadata extraction, and page structure analysis.

parameters.description: The full URL of the webpage to crawl (e.g., 'https://www.example.com').
parameters.name: url

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception

operations.description: Get webpage crawl data, including removing boilerplate, for readable extraction, documentation workflows, and LLM input.

parameters.description: The full URL of the webpage to crawl and convert to Markdown (e.g., 'https://www.example.com').
parameters.name: url

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception

operations.description: Get webpage crawl data, including returns full raw Rendered HTML content, fast and cost-efficient, and optimized for static page crawling, for scraping, metadata extraction, and page structure analysis.

parameters.description: The full URL of the webpage to crawl (e.g., 'https://www.example.com').
parameters.name: url

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
